svg.title: SemiBlock JVM - Toolbox with all block categories and representative blocks
svg.desc: Visual reference of the complete SemiBlock JVM Blockly toolbox: 13 color-coded categories on the left with icons, search box, and a flyout area on the right showing example blocks from every category (styled like the live editor).
svg.text: All 70+ blocks are available via the 13 categories above. The jvm_push block
Blocks connect vertically (statement style). Use labels for control flow targets.
• Live bytecode appears on the right in the editor
• Search filters the category list in real time
